jsonLd.title: FoodWorld is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
